title: How to send a calendar invite in an automation
excerpt: I am looking to be able to send a calendar invite as an automation when a task reaches a status. I would then like to be able to keep that calendar item updated based upon fields in my row. Has anyone had luck putting th…

posts.author: JPalmisano (Jordan Palmisano)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking to be able to send a calendar invite as an automation when a task reaches a status. I would then like to be able to keep that calendar item updated based upon fields in my row. Has anyone had luck putting this together?

Example:
Item 1 moved to Scheduled

Email sent out to Client Email column with a link to add item to calendar as a convenience.

Update made in Monday occurs. Calendar item in Client Calendar is updated.

posts.author: interpreternetwork (Tony Barlow)
posts.cookedHtml: I am keen to do this too. But there is a limitation as it will not send location details across the integration.
